ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the issue */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the issue (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was created */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was closed */,
  "closed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who closed the issue */,
  "merged_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was merged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the issue */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the issue is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_closed_by FOREIGN KEY ("closed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, maintainer, administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the pull request is associated with */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the pull request */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pull request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pull request was created */,
  "merged_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pull request was merged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the pull request (e.g., open, closed, merged) */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Current review status of the pull request (e.g., pending, approved, changes requested) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the pull request */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the pull request */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the pull request is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pull_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_changes" (
  "code_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code change */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the code change is associated with */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file changed */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file changed */,
  "added_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines added */,
  "deleted_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines deleted */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit the code change is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_changes_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_changes_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment is associated with */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the review is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, changes requested) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the label is associated with */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the label is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the label is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the commit is associated with */,
  "hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the commit */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the commit */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "changed_files" (
  "changed_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each changed file */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit the changed file is associated with */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the changed file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the changed file */,
  "diff" TEXT /* Diff of the changes made in the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("changed_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changed_files_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the interaction is associated with */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the interaction is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the interaction */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., comment, review) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interaction was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the interaction (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was last updated */,
  "private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the repository is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_issues" (
  "repository_issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository issue */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the issue is associated with */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue within the repository (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_issues_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_issues_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)
